headline.description: Main event name, punchy. e.g. 'Annual Sports Day 2025'

subheadline.description: One supporting line. e.g. 'All parents and guardians are warmly invited.'

hero_image_path.description: Optional background photo relevant to the event. Leave empty for graphic-only design.

event_label.description: Small eyebrow label above headline. e.g. 'COMING SOON' or 'SAVE THE DATE'
